scheme_name: Post Matric Scholarships Scheme for Minorities
description: A scholarship scheme for students from minority communities studying from class 11 to Ph.D. level.
benefits: Scholarship support for eligible course fees and maintenance allowance as per official scheme rules.
eligibility: Applicant should belong to a notified minority community, be studying in a recognized institution, and meet the official family income and academic criteria.

scheme_name: Pragati Scholarship Scheme for Girl Students
description: A scholarship scheme for girl students admitted to technical diploma or degree courses in AICTE-approved institutions.
benefits: Financial assistance for eligible girl students as per official AICTE scheme rules.
eligibility: Applicant should be a girl student admitted to the first year or lateral entry of an eligible technical course and meet the official family income criteria.

scheme_name: Saksham Scholarship Scheme for Specially Abled Students
description: A scholarship scheme for specially abled students pursuing technical education in AICTE-approved institutions.
benefits: Financial assistance for eligible specially abled students as per official AICTE scheme rules.
eligibility: Applicant should be a specially abled student admitted to an eligible technical diploma or degree course and meet the official disability and income criteria.

description: A scholarship scheme to support meritorious students from economically weaker sections and reduce dropout at secondary stage.
benefits: Scholarship support for selected eligible students as per official scheme rules.
eligibility: Applicant should be a student selected through the official process and meet the income, class, and academic conditions stated by the scheme.

scheme_name: PM YASASVI Central Sector Scheme of Top Class Education in Schools for OBC, EBC and DNT Students
description: A scholarship scheme for eligible OBC, EBC and DNT students studying in identified schools.
benefits: Scholarship support for eligible school education expenses as per official scheme rules.
eligibility: Applicant should belong to eligible OBC, EBC or DNT categories, study in an identified school, and meet the official income and academic criteria.

description: A Telangana scholarship scheme supporting eligible students from specified communities pursuing post-matric education.
benefits: Reimbursement or scholarship support as per Telangana government scheme rules.
eligibility: Applicant should be a Telangana student from an eligible category, studying a post-matric course, and meet the official income and course conditions.

scheme_name: Chief Minister Overseas Scholarship Scheme for Minorities, Telangana
description: A Telangana scheme supporting eligible minority students pursuing higher education overseas.
benefits: Financial assistance for overseas higher education as per Telangana government rules.
eligibility: Applicant should belong to an eligible minority community in Telangana, secure admission abroad, and meet the official income, age, and academic criteria.

description: A Telangana agriculture investment support scheme for eligible farmers.
benefits: Investment support for agriculture as per Telangana government scheme rules.
eligibility: Applicant should be an eligible farmer or landholder as defined by the Telangana government scheme rules.
